message: packet bounds proof is missing: invalid access to packet, off=40 size=2, R3(id=0,off=40,r=41); R3 offset is outside of the packet
required_proof: prove R3 has packet range at least 42 bytes before this access; verifier currently has range 41

related_spans.label: verifier only proves packet range 14 bytes on this path, but the rejected access requires 42 bytes

evidence.detail: invalid access to packet, off=40 size=2, R3(id=0,off=40,r=41); R3 offset is outside of the packet

help: Add or move a packet bounds check immediately before the access or helper argument use.
Check the exact pointer and byte length passed to the helper, not only an earlier header pointer.
